prestazioni: Engine: SR20DET-R (Group A homologation spec, 2.0L inline-4, closed-deck block, forged internals) with a Garrett GT35R turbocharger (84mm compressor, .82 A/R turbine housing) and Tomei 272° cams (1.2mm lift) for optimized mid-to-high RPM power delivery, paired with a N1-spec oil pump and HKS 264-liter/min fuel pump to support 500+ hp on E85 fuel.

Drivetrain: OS Giken 2.2L limited-slip differential (LSD) with 1.5-way preload adjustment, reinforced with a Nismo R32 GT-R clutch (triple-plate, 800kg clamping force) and a custom 4.625 final drive ratio (from a Nismo R33 GT-R) to maximize acceleration in Group A rally stages.

Suspension: Öhlins TTX40 4-way adjustable coilovers (24-click rebound, 22-click compression) with custom valving for the GTI-R’s unique multi-link rear setup, paired with SuperPro poly bushings (front control arms, subframe, and rear trailing arms) and Cusco 22mm front/20mm rear adjustable sway bars for flat cornering on tarmac and gravel.
estetica: Aero: Rocket Bunny V1 GTI-R widebody kit (carbon fiber fenders, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with a custom 3D-printed ABS rear wing (modeled after the WRC Pulsar GTI-R’s high-downforce design) and a Seibon carbon fiber hood (with functional NACA ducts for the GT35R turbo).

Interior: Bride Zeta III bucket seats (FIA-approved, 6-point harnesses) with a custom GTI-R-specific mounting kit, a Nismo 350mm steering wheel (with quick-release hub), and a Defi Advance BF gauge cluster (oil temp, boost, fuel pressure) mounted on a custom aluminum A-pillar pod.

Exterior: Work Meister S1 3P wheels (16x9 +15 front, 16x10 +25 rear) in gold finish, wrapped in Yokohama Advan A052 tires (225/45/16 front, 245/40/16 rear) for tarmac, or BFGoodrich g-Force R1S (215/60/16) for gravel. Full Group A livery with authentic Nissan Motorsport decals (red/black/white) and a custom carbon fiber front splitter with integrated LED auxiliary lights (Hella Rallye 3000).
